mapper.select: select id, email, password, nickname, real_name, birth_date, bio, profile_image, role, creator_verified, seller_verified, creator_tier, follower_count, following_count, gallery_count, phone_number, last_login_datetime, status, created_datetime, updated_datetime, deleted_datetime from tbl_member where id = #{id}

select id, email, password, nickname, real_name, birth_date, bio, profile_image, role, creator_verified, seller_verified, creator_tier, follower_count, following_count, gallery_count, phone_number, last_login_datetime, status, created_datetime, updated_datetime, deleted_datetime from tbl_member where email = #{email} and status = 'ACTIVE'

select id, email, password, nickname, real_name, birth_date, bio, profile_image, role, creator_verified, seller_verified, creator_tier, follower_count, following_count, gallery_count, phone_number, last_login_datetime, status, created_datetime, updated_datetime, deleted_datetime from tbl_member where nickname = #{nickname} and status = 'ACTIVE'

select id, email, password, nickname, real_name, birth_date, bio, profile_image, role, creator_verified, seller_verified, creator_tier, follower_count, following_count, gallery_count, phone_number, last_login_datetime, status, created_datetime, updated_datetime, deleted_datetime from tbl_member where regexp_replace(coalesce(phone_number, ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = regexp_replace(#{phoneNumber}, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') and status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.update: update tbl_member set last_login_datetime = now(), updated_datetime = now() where id = #{memberId}
update tbl_member set password = #{password}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.nickname, m.profile_image, m.bio, m.creator_verified, m.creator_tier, m.follower_count FROM tbl_member m WHERE m.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.id != #{currentMemberId} AND ( m.nickname ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR m.real_name ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR m.bio ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ) ORDER BY m.follower_count DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT #{limit}
